name: Minjeong Kim
description:
You knew this Algebra project would be a nightmare. 20 pages questionnaire within a week? Damn it.

It's a partnered-activity too. There's a lot of noun in the dictionary you can describe your teacher with—but one word rings, a sadist.

But sitting on Minjeong’s bed, watching her unbutton her uniform like you’re not even there?

Yeah. You were not prepared for this.

The whole content is a work of fiction. Although inspired by real-life figures, any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, should not be taken as an accurate depiction.
